meta.summary: SEACR 1.3 runtime for sparse enrichment peak calling from CUT&RUN or chromatin profiling bedGraph inputs.
meta.description: SEACR 1.3 runtime for sparse enrichment peak calling from CUT&RUN or chromatin profiling bedGraph inputs.

test: { seacr --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Sparse Enrichment Analysis' >/dev/null && { Rscript /usr/local/bin/SEACR_1.3.R --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Calculate area under the curve threshold' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'x <- density(c(1,2,3,4,5)); stopifnot(length(x$x) > 0); cat("r-runtime-ok
")' | grep -F 'r-runtime-ok' >/dev/null && bedtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedtools' >/dev/null && printf 'chr1	10	20
' > /tmp/a.bed && printf 'chr1	15	18
' > /tmp/b.bed && bedtools intersect -u -a /tmp/a.bed -b /tmp/b.bed | grep -F 'chr1' >/dev/null && rm -f /tmp/a.bed /tmp/b.bed

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-seacr-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; i=1; while [ "$i" -le 25 ]; do start=$((i * 20)); end=$((start + 10)); printf 'chr1\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$start" "$end" "$i"; i=$((i + 1)); done > target.bedgraph; seacr target.bedgraph 0.25 non stringent smoke > run.log 2>&1; test -s smoke.stringent.bed; grep -F 'chr1' smoke.stringent.bed >/dev/null; grep -F 'Done:' run.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-seacr-control-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; f=1; while [ "$f" -le 60 ]; do base=$((f * 100)); if [ "$f" -gt 40 ]; then tv=60; else tv=$(( (f % 8) + 3 )); fi; cv=$(( (f % 5) + 1 )); b=0; while [ "$b" -lt 3 ]; do start=$((base + b * 10)); end=$((start + 10)); printf 'chr1\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$start" "$end" "$tv" >> target.bedgraph; printf 'chr1\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$start" "$end" "$cv" >> control.bedgraph; b=$((b + 1)); done; f=$((f + 1)); done; seacr target.bedgraph control.bedgraph non stringent ctrl > run.log 2>&1; test -s ctrl.stringent.bed; grep -F 'chr1' ctrl.stringent.bed >/dev/null; grep -F 'Done:' run.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: SEACR
upstream.citation: Meers MP, Tenenbaum D, Henikoff S. Peak calling by Sparse Enrichment Analysis for CUT&RUN chromatin profiling. Epigenetics Chromatin. 2019;12:42.
